title: funtumia scheffleri
intro: Funtumia scheffleri, also known as African varnish tree or African copal, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a medicinal plant valued for its various health benefits and properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Funtumia scheffleri can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
